tasks.title: Network Configuration
tasks.instructions:
Configure the network interface on node1 with the following static settings:

- IP address: 172.25.250.11/24
- Default gateway: 172.25.250.254
- DNS server: 172.25.250.254
- Hostname: node1.lab.example.com

All settings must persist across reboots.

tasks.title: YUM Repositories
tasks.instructions:
Configure two YUM/DNF repositories on node1:

- Repository name: BaseOS
  URL: http://content/rhel9.0/x86_64/dvd/BaseOS

- Repository name: AppStream
  URL: http://content/rhel9.0/x86_64/dvd/AppStream

GPG signature checking must be disabled for both repositories.

tasks.title: SELinux Web Port 82
tasks.instructions:
Configure the Apache HTTP server (httpd) to serve content on port 82:

- Install and enable httpd
- Configure httpd to listen on port 82
- Add the appropriate SELinux port label for port 82
- Allow port 82/tcp through the firewall

The web server must be accessible on port 82 and the configuration must persist across reboots.

tasks.title: Users and Groups
tasks.instructions:
Perform the following user and group management tasks:

1. Create a supplementary group named manager
2. Create user harry with manager as a supplementary group
3. Create user natasha with manager as a supplementary group
4. Create user sarah with /sbin/nologin as the login shell
5. Set the password trootent for users harry, natasha, and sarah

All users must be able to authenticate with the specified password.

tasks.title: Collaborative Directory
tasks.instructions:
Create a collaborative directory /shared/sysadm with the following properties:

- Group ownership: sysadm
- Permissions: group sysadm has full read/write/execute access; others have no permissions
- New files created inside must automatically inherit group ownership of sysadm

The permissions must persist across reboots.

tasks.title: autofs NFS Automount
tasks.instructions:
Configure autofs to automatically mount the NFS home directory for user remoteuser5:

- NFS server: registry.example.com (172.24.10.150)
- Exported path: /ruser/remoteuser5
- Local automount point: /rhome/remoteuser5

The directory must be mounted on-demand when accessed and the configuration must survive a reboot.

tasks.title: Cron Job
tasks.instructions:
Configure a cron job for user natasha:

- Schedule: every day at 14:23
- Command: echo "hiyu"

The cron job must run under natasha's personal crontab.

tasks.title: NTP Client
tasks.instructions:
Configure the system to synchronize time with the following NTP server:

- NTP server: classroom.example.com

The time synchronization service must be enabled and start automatically at boot.

tasks.title: Find Files by Owner
tasks.instructions:
Find all files owned by user sarah anywhere on the system and save the list to /root/find.user.

The file must contain one absolute file path per line.

tasks.title: Find Strings in File
tasks.instructions:
Search /usr/share/dict/words for lines containing the string strato and save the matching lines to /root/lines.

The output file must contain only the matching lines in their original order.

tasks.title: User with UID
tasks.instructions:
Create a new user account with the following properties:

- Username: jean
- UID: 4332
- Password: radiowits

The user must be able to authenticate with the specified password.

tasks.title: Tar Archive
tasks.instructions:
Create a gzip-compressed tar archive of the /etc directory:

- Archive location: /root/archive.gz
- Source directory: /etc

The archive must be in gzip-compressed tar format.

tasks.title: Container Systemd Service
tasks.instructions:
As user walhalla, configure a Podman container as a persistent systemd user service:

- Build the container image from the Containerfile located at /home/linus/ascii-to-pdf/
- Container name: ascii2pdf
- Mount /opt/files to /opt/files inside the container
- Mount /opt/processes to /opt/processes inside the container
- Create a systemd user unit for the container named container-ascii2pdf.service
- The service must start automatically at boot without requiring an active login session

tasks.title: Default File Permissions
tasks.instructions:
Configure the default file creation permissions for user daffy:

- New files must be created with permissions: 400 (r--------)
- New directories must be created with permissions: 550 (r-xr-x---)

The setting must be applied persistently to daffy's login environment.

tasks.title: Root Password Reset
tasks.instructions:
Reset the root password on node2 (boot-menu VM) to trootent using the VNC console.

The root account must be accessible with the new password after a reboot. SELinux must remain in enforcing mode.

tasks.title: YUM Repositories NODE2
tasks.instructions:
Configure two YUM/DNF repositories on node2 (lvm VM):

- Repository name: BaseOS
  URL: http://content/rhel9.0/x86_64/dvd/BaseOS

- Repository name: AppStream
  URL: http://content/rhel9.0/x86_64/dvd/AppStream

GPG signature checking must be disabled.

tasks.title: Resize Logical Volume
tasks.instructions:
On node2 (lvm VM), resize the logical volume vo so its size is between 225 MiB and 275 MiB.

The filesystem must remain intact and mounted after resizing.

tasks.title: Swap Partition
tasks.instructions:
On node2 (lvm VM), add swap space with a size between 460 MiB and 560 MiB.

The swap must activate automatically at boot.

tasks.title: Create Logical Volume
tasks.instructions:
On node2 (lvm VM), perform the following LVM storage tasks:

1. Create a volume group named database using available unallocated disk space
2. In the database VG, create a logical volume named engineering with 20 extents, formatted as vfat, and mounted persistently at /mnt/database
3. Create a second volume group named datastore containing a logical volume of exactly 8 MiB

All mounts must persist across reboots.

tasks.title: tuned Profile
tasks.instructions:
On node1 (standard VM), set the active tuned performance profile to virtual-guest.

The profile must persist across reboots.
